title: Fridericus Rex - 1. Teil: Sturm und Drang
writer: Hans Behrendt, Bobby E. Lüthge, Arzén von Cserépy
actors: Otto Gebühr, Albert Steinrück, Gertrud de Lalsky
plot: Part 1 of a four part series of biographical films about king Friedrich II of Prussia focuses on his early life, his love of music and his father's displeasure with it.
